heroHeadline: Investigation Launched into Post-Prison Deportation Practices
heroSubtitle: EOIR judges who halted removal orders against student visa holders for campus Palestine demonstrations dismissed; AILA condemns purge as assault on judicial independence; administration restructures immigration courts to align with enforcement priorities; asylum grant rate falls to 7% as White House declares 'Era of Amnesty Is Over'
footerNote: Data sourced from DHS, ICE official records, ACLU, HRW, DHS OIG, TRAC Reports, Detention Watch Network, court records, and Congressional records
